title: selenicereus grandiflorus subsp. hondurensis
intro: Selenicereus grandiflorus subsp. hondurensis, also known as Honduran night-blooming cereus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the genus Selenicereus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Selenicereus grandiflorus subsp. hondurensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
